perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a young woman wearing a beige cap and a grey knitted sweater sitting in a studio, speaking into a microphone while holding a yellow patterned pillow. (2) The scene cuts to a person wearing a large, smiling Buddha mask who is also holding a pillow and reacting to the speaker. (3) Subsequent cuts show a man and a woman sitting on a couch wearing headphones, listening and reacting to the main storyteller. (4) The woman in the cap uses active hand gestures and facial expressions to describe a dramatic event. (5) The video ends with a promotional text overlay and a logo appearing over the footage.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Light, upbeat background music plays. A female voice begins speaking in Traditional Chinese with an expressive and narrative tone. (2) A male voice enters with energetic interjections and laughter, creating a conversational atmosphere. (3) Multiple voices are heard laughing and commenting briefly, suggesting a group discussion. (4) The music remains consistent in the background as the storyteller's volume and speed fluctuate with the narrative's tension. (5) The voices fade out as the music slightly increases towards the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear throughout the video, transcribing the conversation about a colleague's mother causing a scene at work. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: At the end of the video, a large text overlay appears: '完整影片請上大頭佛工作室頻道收看' (Watch the full video on the Big Buddha Studio channel), serving as a call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Storytelling intro -> Multi-person reaction and discussion -> Climax of the anecdote -> Promotional Outro.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female speaker, 1 masked male respondent, 2 secondary participants (1 male, 1 female) on a couch.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a beige 'New Era' cap, a light grey oversized knitted sweater, and holding a yellow and white geometric pattern pillow.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A room decorated with shelves full of various pop-culture figurines and action figures (notably Dragon Ball Z characters). There are microphones on boom arms, a leather armchair, a green couch, and blue curtains.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Setup -> Anecdote Delivery -> Reaction -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional clip for a podcast or variety show. It uses an engaging, relatable anecdote about workplace drama (a colleague's difficult mother) to hook the audience's interest and encourage them to visit the full channel for more content.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: On-screen text explicitly tells viewers to visit the 'Big Buddha Studio' channel for the full video.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The use of the distinctive 'Big Buddha' mask and the background filled with collectibles.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video fits the popular 'podcast highlights' format common on social media platforms like TikTok or Instagram, designed for quick consumption and conversion.
